title: wkappbot windows -- focus flag and no-filter relevance mode
desc: Two new windows command modes: (1) --focus shows focused child hwnd + proper grap expression per window. (2) no-filter mode shows only wkappbot-related windows ranked by coverage score.
steps: [FOCUS-FLAG] wkappbot windows [filter] --focus: for each window shows (a) KB focus child hwnd+class via GetGUIThreadInfo, (b) UIA leaf ControlType+position+editable, (c) proper paste-ready grap: {hwnd,pid,proc,cls}#AbsTagPath built via BuildTargetJson5+BuildAbsoluteTagPath -- same format as a11y find output. Use when you need the grap for the currently focused element without running a11y find.

[NO-FILTER-MODE] wkappbot windows (no args): instead of listing all windows, shows only wkappbot-related windows ranked by coverage score. Pass 1 (fast): proc-cov*3 + title-cov*2 + class-cov*1. Pass 2 (batch WMI, only for score==0 windows): cmdline-cov*2 via single SELECT ProcessId,CommandLine FROM Win32_Process WHERE ProcessId IN (...) query. Sort: score desc, foreground tiebreak. Symbols: wkappbot/wkappbot-core/a11y/WK AppBot/WhisperRing.

[COVERAGE-FORMULA] coverage(field, sym) = matched_length / field_length (0..1). Plain string: matched_length = sym.Length. Regex (regex: prefix): matched_length = Regex.Match(field, pattern).Length -- NOT pattern length (avoids wrong coverage for OR-regex like regex:a
bb). Exact match -> 1.0 (100%). Partial -> proportional. Source: InspectionCommands.Windows.cs Coverage() local function.

[CONVERTED-TO-A11Y-FIND] wkappbot windows was converted to a11y find in v6.1. It is now a thin alias: 'wkappbot windows <grap>' == 'wkappbot a11y find <grap>'. All windows command options (--focus, --filter, --process, --class, coverage scoring) are now part of the a11y find pipeline. Prefer wkappbot a11y find directly for full output format and # TARGET / # END stable grap lines.
author: claude
